lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission function perfectly. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition and shows no signs of wear.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic restoration to be roadworthy. The exterior exhibits significant rust along the wheel wells and rocker panels, several large dents, and heavily oxidized paint. Mechanically, the engine requires a major overhaul, and there are significant issues with the transmission and braking system. The interior shows heavy wear, including a cracked dashboard and torn upholstery. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is best suited as a project vehicle or for parts.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It is functional but shows noticeable wear and tear on the interior and exterior. It has some mechanical issues that will require attention in the future.

This car is a solid and reliable choice for anyone looking for a practical vehicle at a great price! It's in fair condition, showing some typical wear and tear from its adventures, but it still has plenty of life left in it. It’s a functional, honest ride that’s ready to get you where you need to go while being easy on the budget!

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a dependable commuter for someone who doesn't mind some cosmetic imperfections. The engine starts up reliably and the car handles well on the highway, though there is a small oil leak that should be monitored. The exterior shows its age with several surface scratches and a small dent on the passenger side door. Inside, the seats show moderate wear and the headliner is starting to sag slightly in the back. It has been recently serviced for an oil change, but the tires are nearing the end of their tread life. Overall, it’s a solid, functional car that reflects its years of service.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, meticulously preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle boasts an impeccable provenance and remains in a state of absolute mechanical and aesthetic refinement. Every detail reflects a standard of care that transcends conventional ownership, offering the discerning driver a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless example of its class.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that’s practically brand new? I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s in such incredible shape you’d think it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied this car since day one—always garaged and kept spotless. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have!

Presenting a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in Carbon Black Metallic. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp through six individual throttle bodies and a precision-gated Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanically overhauled with documented rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive VANOS bulletproofing. The chassis remains rigid with zero subframe fatigue, riding on a perfectly balanced MacPherson
Mint condition. Clean title. Garage kept. No scratches or dents. Full service history. Drives like new.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom-fresh condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with zero swirl marks or stone chips, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the leather remains supple and fragrant, showing no signs of bolster wear, and the cabin has been strictly smoke-free and pet-free. Every mechanical component performs flawlessly, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history from authorized specialists. All original keys, manuals, and the window sticker are included. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered.

We are pleased to present this superlative example, maintained in showroom condition and reflecting the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits no discernible wear, offering a peerless aesthetic and mechanical profile for the discerning collector. A rare opportunity to acquire a truly impeccable asset.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presented in impeccable showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, it offers an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning collector. Its pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity establish it as a premier example of its class.

Hey everyone! 🚗 Check out this absolute beauty! I'm parting with my pride and joy, and honestly, she’s in pristine, showroom condition. Not a single blemish anywhere—it's like buying a brand new car without the dealership headache. I’ve babied this ride since day one, and it really shows! Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love at first sight!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3, representing the zenith of BMW's naturally aspirated era. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure dual-VANOS variable valve timing for an 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis is structurally immaculate, with documented subframe reinforcement and zero oxidation on the undercarriage. Power is delivered via a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The exterior retains its factory-spec depth and luster, while the interior Nappa leather remains supple with no bolster wear. Suspension kinematics are razor-sharp, maintaining factory-correct damping and bushing integrity. This is a concours-level vehicle for the purist collector.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Full service history. No mechanical issues. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly museum-grade example that redefines what it means to be 'pre-owned.' This vehicle is in showroom condition, boasting a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish that has been protected by a professional ceramic coating. There are absolutely no dings, stone chips, or swirl marks to be found. The interior is equally immaculate; the premium leather seats remain firm and unscuffed, and the cabin still retains its original factory scent. Every button, switch, and electronic feature functions as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. This specimen exhibits an uncompromising standard of care, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior environment. Rigorously inspected and maintained to exacting specifications, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, offering the sophisticated driver an unparalleled ownership experience and absolute mechanical confidence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a pristine exterior and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects a history of fastidious care. Every mechanical component operates with the precision expected of a showroom-quality specimen. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering provides a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly superlative condition.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this car is. It’s in absolute mint condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's looking for a new owner who will love it just as much. Come take a look and see for yourself, you won't be disappointed! ✨
Offered is a concours-level 2011 BMW M3 (E92) featuring the high-revving S65 4
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title.

Experience automotive perfection with this meticulously maintained masterpiece. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been strictly garage-kept and hand-washed since day one. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely zero scratches, chips, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and it still carries that distinct new-car scent. Mechanically, it is flawless. Every scheduled service has been performed exclusively by certified technicians, with a full paper trail included. The engine runs whisper-quiet, and the transmission shifts with factory-spec precision. It comes equipped with all original accessories, two sets of keys, and matching tires with near-full tread. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that defies its pre-owned status. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the preserved interior surfaces, confirms its status as a premier offering. Experience uncompromising performance and prestige in a vehicle that remains indistinguishable from new.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peerless performance and reliability. This is, without compromise, the definitive example of its class.

Hey everyone! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream! This car is in truly mint condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It's been meticulously cared for, kept in a garage, and looks absolutely pristine inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that's basically brand new and ready for some adventures, you’ve found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
This investment-grade specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The sub
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. Full service records. No accidents. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional example that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its factory-fresh appearance and performance. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, and the original scent of high-quality materials persists. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach—every service has been performed ahead of schedule by certified technicians, with a comprehensive folder of records to prove its pedigree. From the spotless engine bay to the unmarked alloy wheels, every detail reflects a life of pampered ownership. This is a rare opportunity to own a time capsule that drives exactly as it did the day it left the showroom floor.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, meticulously maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting flawless aesthetics and peerless mechanical integrity. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance.
